needs.summary: Paginated, filterable list of all businesses on the platform, one row per business, combining identity, plan, BVUM position, credit usage, staff count, join date, and status.
fields: bvumKobo (current business value under management, integer kobo)
ceilingKobo (effective plan BVUM ceiling; for enterprise reflects the purchased band, N40M base + N20M per band)
creditsGrant (monthly grant; null means enterprise fair use)
needs.filters/actions: Server-side filters: plan (exact enum match), status (exact enum match, where 'test' derives from the test-account flag), free-text search matching business name substring or owner phone with whitespace stripped. Offset pagination per conventions ({data, page, total}). Over-ceiling (bvumKobo > ceilingKobo) and over-grant (creditsUsed > creditsGrant) states are derived client-side from these fields, no extra flags needed.

needs.summary: Platform-wide total business count for the page subtitle ('N businesses on the platform') and the 'Showing X of N' filtered variant. Satisfied by the unfiltered total in the paginated envelope; no separate endpoint implied.

Row click navigates to /businesses/detail/?id=<businessId>; this screen only needs a stable Business.id usable as the detail lookup key. The detail payload itself is the detail screen's fragment, not this one's.
needs.filters/actions: navigation only, no additional backend call from this screen

surfaces.surface: PageHeader subtitle business count ('16 businesses on the platform' / 'Showing X of Y businesses')
